name: @sofia-open-source/analyze-coverage-mcp
description: MCP Server that bridges LCOV coverage reports to AI agents

scripts.bundle: esbuild src/index.ts --bundle --platform=node --format=cjs --outfile=./analyze-coverage-mcp && sed -i '' '1s|^|#!/usr/bin/env node\n|' ./analyze-coverage-mcp && echo '[ok] analyze-coverage-mcp built'
